html:
Exclusive to:

“A working heart that needs a new body.”

-

The Shadow Atrium is a Don't Starve Together exclusive item, introduced in A New Reign. It is dropped by killing a level 3 Shadow Piece. It can be used to revive the Odd Skeleton to spawn a Reanimated Skeleton. If consumed by an Ornery Chest, it will become a Possessed Shadow Atrium.

Killing the Ancient Fuelweaver will consume the Shadow Atrium used to spawn it.

If the Ancient Fuelweaver dies by stepping out of the Ancient Gateway area, or by pulling the key out, he will drop the Shadow Atrium and the Fossil Fragments instead of his usual drops.

Usage

Trivia

  • The Shadow Atrium was added alongside the Shadow Pieces in the Arts and Crafts update, but it could not be used until the Heart of the Ruins update.
  • An atrium is one of the top chambers in which blood enters the heart.

Gallery

  • Shadow Atrium as seen in the poster for the Heart of the Ruins update.
  • The Shadow Atrium on the ground.

Exclusive to:
Shadow Atrium
Object Info
Does not stack
Source
Dropped by
(Only if not killed in a fight)
Miscellaneous
"shadowheart"
“The power of science must have reanimated it...”
–Wilson
“Oh, ewww! Who would ever touch that?!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is not shaking! Is manly flexing!!”
–Wolfgang
“It beats with a sorrow to span the skies and plumb the darkest seas.”
–Wendy
“THIS FLESHLING ORGAN PULSES WITH PURE EVIL!”
–WX-78
“This... This is no child's magic.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yeesh. Don't get that near me.”
–Woodie
“A pulse of malice and betrayal beats within.”
–Maxwell
“Blackest hearts. Darkest ömens.”
–Wigfrid
“Why does it make me feel so bad?”
–Webber
“That beef heart is almost certainly past its prime.”
–Warly
“Cold. But still beating...”
–Wormwood
“This is twisted.”
–Winona
“Oh, how neat! It continues to beat.”
–Wortox
“Feel... sad...”
–Wurt
“Look at that! I wonder what's keeping it alive?”
–Walter
“It's still beating...”
–Wanda
“A working heart that needs a new body.”
-
The Shadow Atrium is a Don't Starve Together exclusive item, introduced in A New Reign. It is dropped by killing a level 3 Shadow Piece. It can be used to revive the Odd Skeleton to spawn a Reanimated Skeleton. If consumed by an Ornery Chest, it will become a Possessed Shadow Atrium.
Killing the Ancient Fuelweaver will consume the Shadow Atrium used to spawn it.
If the Ancient Fuelweaver dies by stepping out of the Ancient Gateway area, or by pulling the key out, he will drop the Shadow Atrium and the Fossil Fragments instead of his usual drops.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Shadow Atrium was added alongside the Shadow Pieces in the Arts and Crafts update, but it could not be used until the Heart of the Ruins update.
An atrium is one of the top chambers in which blood enters the heart.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Shadow Atrium as seen in the poster for the Heart of the Ruins update.
The Shadow Atrium on the ground.

I wonder what's keeping it alive? |wanda = It's still beating... |choose = wigfrid}}{{Scrapbook Info|A working heart that needs a new body.}} The '''Shadow Atrium''' is a ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' exclusive item, introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It is dropped by killing a level 3 [[Shadow Pieces|Shadow Piece]]. It can be used to revive the [[Fossils|Odd Skeleton]] to spawn a [[Reanimated Skeleton]]. If consumed by an [[Ornery Chest]], it will become a [[Possessed Shadow Atrium]]. Killing the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]] will consume the Shadow Atrium used to spawn it. If the Ancient Fuelweaver dies by stepping out of the [[Ancient Gateway]] area, or by pulling the key out, he will drop the Shadow Atrium and the [[Fossils|Fossil Fragments]] instead of his usual drops. == [[File:Icon Tools.png|32px|link=]] Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Shadow Atrium |tool = Ornery Chest |result = Possessed Shadow Atrium }} ==[[File:Placeholder.png|32px|link=]] Trivia== * The Shadow Atrium was added alongside the Shadow Pieces in the ''[[A New Reign#October 13th, 2016 - Arts and Crafts|Arts and Crafts]]'' update, but it could not be used until the ''[[A New Reign#February 23rd, 2017 - Heart of the Ruins (Part 1)|Heart of the Ruins]]'' update. * An [[Wikipedia:Atrium (heart)|atrium]] is one of the top chambers in which blood enters the heart. ==[[File:Blueprint.png|32px|link=]] Gallery== DSTupdate heartoftheruins sm.png|Shadow Atrium as seen in the poster for the ''[[A New Reign#February 23, 2017 - Heart of the Ruins (Part 1)|Heart of the Ruins]]'' update.
